arts.ttl: Arsenal boss provides Leah Williamson injury update after training ground incident
arts.sum: Williamson missed Sunday's Women's Super League opener against Manchester City and will also sit out the Champions League qualifier against Hacken

arts.ttl: Was it a foul? Analysing Katie McCabe's challenge during Arsenal's draw with Man City
arts.sum: Arsenal's opening game of the 2024/25 Barclays Women's Super League ended in a draw against Manchester City, and Katie McCabe's controversial tackles were certainly back on full display. The clash in question played an instrumental role in regaining possession for Arsenal, resulting in Mead's leveller.

arts.ttl: Williamson to miss CL second leg vs Hacken due to concussion protocol
arts.sum: Leah Williamson has been ruled out of the second leg of Arsenal Women's Champions League second-round tie against Hacken due to concussion protocol.
